samples.gvd:
module sequence_detector #(
    parameter IDLE = 5'b00001,
    parameter S1   = 5'b00010,
    parameter S2   = 5'b00100,
    parameter S3   = 5'b01000,
    parameter S4   = 5'b10000
) (
    input  clk,
    input  rst_n,
    input  data_in,
    output sequence_detected
);
    
    reg [4:0] current_state;
    reg [4:0] next_state;
    always @(*) begin
        case(current_state)
            5'b00001: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                    next_state = 5'b00010;
                end else begin
                    next_state = 5'b00001;
                end
            end
            5'b00010: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                    next_state = 5'b00100;
                end else begin
                    next_state = 5'b00001;
                end
            end
            5'b00100: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                    next_state = 5'b01000;
                end else begin
                    next_state = 5'b00001;
                end
            end
            5'b01000: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                    next_state = 5'b10000;
                end else begin
                    next_state = 5'b00001;
                end
            end
            5'b10000: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                    next_state = 5'b00001;
                end else begin
                    next_state = 5'b00001;
                end
            end
        endcase
    end
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if(rst_n == 1'b0) begin
            current_state <= 5'b00001;
        end else begin
            current_state <= next_state;
        end
    end
    
    assign sequence_detected = (current_state == 5'b10000);
endmodule
